summary: Exceptional soundboard recording praised as the best‑sounding copy, capturing a wonderful performance.
review: Both reviewers hail this show as a standout listening experience, calling it the best‑sounding copy on the Internet Archive and an incredible sounding Dead concert. The SBD source delivers crystal‑clear audio that lets listeners enjoy the performance even without detailed notes on specific songs or moments.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight superb sound quality and overall enjoyment; limited detail on musical specifics keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers describe the recording as the best‑sounding copy, noting crystal‑clear, incredible sound throughout.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific setlist comments; reviewers simply note the show is wonderful and highly enjoyable.
